name: Thermador Groupe SA
summary: Thermador Groupe SA, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the distribution business in France and internationally. The company offers central heating and domestic hot water accessories, pumps for heating, plumbing equipment, taps, valves for building, ventilation equipment and accessories, industrial valves and fittings, cold water pumps, swimming pool equipment and accessories, air compressors, generators, and welding stations. It also provides accessories and connectors for central heating and domestic water, and plumbing fitments; pipework for the distribution of building fluids; components to original equipment manufacturers; and connectors and meters for construction industry and water supply. In addition, the company offers motorized valves and specialty products for industry; stainless steel connectors, flanges, valves, and accessories; pumps, tanks, accessories, and lifting stations; equipment and accessories for swimming pool construction and maintenance; bathroom and kitchen taps for DIY superstores and retail outlets; domestic pumps, plumbing fitments, and other taps for DIY superstores; and compressors, compressed air tools, welding stations, generators, battery chargers, and heating for DIY stores. Thermador Groupe SA offers its products to wholesalers in heating and sanitation, pumps, plumbing fittings, and industrialists. The company was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Saint-Quentin-Fallavier, France.
